title: <div>4. Does St. Paul’s have a formal adjunct faculty compensation policy that o
content:
4. Does St. Paul’s have a formal adjunct faculty compensation policy that outlines these expectations?
 
Would you be able to provide written clarification on adjunct compensation expectations to ensure transparency in instructional duties beyond direct classroom hours?
 
Best,Anthony James Padavano
context: From document: Dear Dr. Guirguis, — chunk 16 (chunk 16/16)
